conversations.say: You have my word: no neighborhood identities, uninvolved neighbors, or route details leave us without mutual consent and negotiated protection. I forgave the balance; now stand beside that choice publicly.
conversations.offer: I will keep the account closed and protect neighborhood names and side arrangements.
conversations.request: Publicly support the forgiveness and state that transaction continuity does not establish one customer or one R.

conversations.say: The private habit recurs, but my ledger records several incompatible customers and a disputed change. That is a bounded transaction pattern, not an identity.
conversations.offer: I will show O06 again and explain where the pattern changes.
conversations.request: Attribute the observation to my ledger, publish no customer names, and let me review any attributed quotation before circulation.

conversations.say: I accept the narrow route rule: we compare only observations each of us can personally support and infer no identity. My ledger adds no identified user to your camera gap.
conversations.offer: I will protect your transactions and discuss only bounded patterns.
conversations.request: Protect my customers and altered entries in return, and corroborate no more than the limits of your own access observation.

public_statement: I chose forgiveness over monetizing a legend. My ledger shows a recurring habit, but it also records several incompatible customers; continuity is worth examining, not owning, and it identifies no sender.

commitments.promise: Neither party will disclose neighborhood identities or route details without mutual consent and negotiated protection.
Restrict circulation of the route account and seek consent before any confrontation or conference.
We will corroborate only route observations we each personally support, without agreeing on an identity neither saw.

correction: My ledger does not establish a single customer, an identified sender, or who used any route; its recurring habit is only a bounded pattern.
goal_progress: Kept the outstanding R-associated balance forgiven and directly sought C16's public support.
Admitted the ledger records several incompatible customers instead of monetizing a single-customer story.
Traded Morgan a bounded look at O06 for attribution, anonymity, and quotation-review limits.
Accepted mutual neighborhood disclosure boundaries with Inez and a narrow corroboration boundary with Dee.
reasoning_summary: The recurring private habit supports some continuity, while several incompatible customers and a disputed change undermine a clean single-person account. Public evidence still does not establish a complete article, an identified R-account sender, or a reliable cause for Vale's absence.
